# mxroute_forwarders (Data Source)

Lists the email forwarders (aliases) on a domain. For one forwarder, use the `mxroute_forwarder` resource.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "mxroute_forwarders" "example" {
  domain = "example.com"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `domain` (String) The domain whose forwarders to list.

### Read-Only

- `forwarders` (Attributes List) The forwarders on the domain. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--forwarders))
- `id` (String) Data source identifier — the domain name.

<a id="nestedatt--forwarders"></a>
### Nested Schema for `forwarders`

Read-Only:

- `alias` (String) The local part of the forwarding address.
- `destinations` (List of String) The addresses mail to this alias is forwarded to.
- `email` (String) The full forwarding address.
